'''tarate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yearnfully|yearnfully]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-r-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yearnfully|yearnfully]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tarate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:tarate|tarate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:taratesher|taratesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:taratesherĂ«m|taratesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:taratero|taratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tarateshĂ«|tarateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tarateshĂ«m|tarateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitaratero|gokitaratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitarateshĂ«|gokitarateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitarateshĂ«m|gokitarateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotarankerom|gotarankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotarankeshĂ«|gotarankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotarankeshĂ«m|gotarankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotarankeya|gotarankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:taraterom|taraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:taratemu|taratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tarateya|tarateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitaraterom|gokitaraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitaratemu|gokitaratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitarateya|gokitarateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:tararate|tararate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tararatesher|tararatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tararatesherĂ«m|tararatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tararatero|tararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tararateshĂ«|tararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tararateshĂ«m|tararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitararatero|gokitararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitararateshĂ«|gokitararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitararateshĂ«m|gokitararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotararankerom|gotararankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotararankeshĂ«|gotararankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotararankeshĂ«m|gotararankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotararankeya|gotararankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tararaterom|tararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tararatemu|tararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tararateya|tararateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitararaterom|gokitararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitararatemu|gokitararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitararateya|gokitararateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:tĂŠrĂŠte|tĂŠrĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tĂŠrĂŠtesher|tĂŠrĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m|tĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠrĂŠtero|tĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|tĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|tĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠrĂŠtero|gokitĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|gokitĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|gokitĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotĂŠrĂŠnkerom|gotĂŠrĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«|gotĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gotĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotĂŠrĂŠnkeya|gotĂŠrĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠrĂŠterom|tĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠrĂŠtemu|tĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tĂŠrĂŠteya|tĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠrĂŠterom|gokitĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠrĂŠtemu|gokitĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitĂŠrĂŠteya|gokitĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:tafrafte|tafrafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tafraftesher|tafraftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafraftesherĂ«m|tafraftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafraftero|tafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tafrafteshĂ«|tafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafrafteshĂ«m|tafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafraftero|gokitafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitafrafteshĂ«|gokitafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafrafteshĂ«m|gokitafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotafrafnkerom|gotafrafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotafrafnkeshĂ«|gotafrafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotafrafnkeshĂ«m|gotafrafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotafrafnkeya|gotafrafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafrafterom|tafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafraftemu|tafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tafrafteya|tafrafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafrafterom|gokitafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafraftemu|gokitafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitafrafteya|gokitafrafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
